api_key.description: Amplitude project API key. Used as the HTTP Basic auth username; never logged.

secret_key.description: Amplitude project secret key. Used as the HTTP Basic auth password; never logged.

base_url.description: Amplitude Analytics REST API base URL. Defaults to the Standard-server host; set explicitly to https://analytics.eu.amplitude.com for EU-residency projects (see docs.md Known limits).

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.

taxonomy_show_deleted.description: Optional 'true'/'false' string forwarded as the showDeleted query parameter on the taxonomy_events and taxonomy_user_properties streams. Left unset, the parameter is omitted and Amplitude applies its own default (deleted items excluded).
